prose:
The frontier orbitals (HOMO and LUMO) for ethylene have been calculated using Density Functional Theory (DFT). The calculation was performed with the B3LYP functional and def2-TZVP basis set (tier `standard`), in the gas phase (dielectric constant 1.0), with a charge of 0 and multiplicity of 1. The geometry was taken from the user-provided `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/ethylene/ethylene.xyz` file. The SCF calculation converged in 6 cycles.

The results are as follows:
- HOMO energy: -7.6155818 eV
- LUMO energy: -0.17986527 eV
- HOMO-LUMO gap: 7.4357165 eV

The live log is available at `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/ethylene/argo_gemini-2.5-flash/20260703-230302_ethylene_frontier_orbitals/frontier_20260703-230308.out`.
